{{Quote|That hauler will take you to our base in the Lenico Belt.|Tavion Axmis to Kyle Katarn|<ref name="Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]''</ref>}}
The '''''1-138''''' was an automated hauler transporting [[Cortosis/Legends|cortosis]] from [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Cairn Installation]] during the brief period that the [[City/Legends|city]] was occupied by the [[Empire Reborn]]. After the defeat of [[Tavion Axmis]] by [[Kyle Katarn]] in the [[Battle of Bespin (Empire Reborn)|Battle of Cloud City]], Katarn sneaked aboard ''1-138'' which took him to the [[Cairn Installation]].

==Behind the scenes==
The name of the hauler is revealed in dialogue in a cutscene.

1-138 is a [[1138 (easter egg)|reference]] to [[Wikipedia:THX 1138|''THX 1138'']], [[George Lucas]]'s first film; there are many such references in ''Star Wars'' material.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]''
